description:
## [1.2.0](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0) (2026-06-24)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* fixed ads removal - now also ads in the search carousel and search feed are hidden ([7cdf5ee](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/7cdf5ee8a3944e06ed2908d1e4a5fe8f813ec27e))
* **pinterest:** now ads in the search feed are also hidden ([2a5fc2f](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/2a5fc2f157ae4d50619ae425967109b73c0b49e2))

### ✨ New Features

* added download video patch ([f4a6603](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/f4a660373ba7d0cc7a59688b5bb9380d5ed7b14d))
* **pinterest:** add copy direct link patch ([d2a9748](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/d2a974885451506b883e9faa03ca08aa8679d9a2))
* **pinterest:** added download video button ([83d3a7e](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/83d3a7ecc248bbb626ecb5f0912da3d9691313e3))
* **pinterest:** added spoofing pinterest apk signature ([2e45123](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/2e45123a337d1f926493a5aa6e5b19012fb0d067))
* **pinterest:** download videos is properly working, some sources are not available tho ([30d7219](https://github.com/browzomje/browzomje-patches/commit/30d7219de8fd5d37b3b31a2aa940bd2ea8a0bd51))
